nodes.label: smoke_dashboard_ws.py — Live WS Smoke Test (terminal + runner)
nodes.rationale: Proof-of-execution trick: sends Write-Output ('MC_'+'TERM_OK') so the typed command never contains the literal marker — seeing MC_TERM_OK in ANSI-stripped output proves the shell actually executed it, not just echoed it.

edges.source_location: ws://127.0.0.1:8765/ws/run — expects whitelist rejection of 'format c:'
both verify runner whitelist rejection — one live against running server, one in-process via TestClient
